common.appTagline: Rare-pet lifecycle portal, pick, vet, shop, farewell, starting in Songpa.

onboarding.title: Pick your first pet
onboarding.description: Choose a rare animal and we'll wire up vets, food, care, community and farewell for you.
onboarding.categoryHint: Each category gets its own specialist vets, shops and community feed.
onboarding.speciesHint: Your dashboard curates everything around this pick.
onboarding.locationHint: We default to Songpa-gu, Seoul. Pick another area or use your current location.
onboarding.currentFailed: Couldn't detect, falling back to Songpa-gu.

categories.birdDesc: Parrots, raptors and rare small birds
categories.mammalDesc: Beyond hamsters, sugar gliders, ferrets etc.

lifecycle.title: Pet lifecycle
lifecycle.subtitle: From your first pick to a respectful farewell.

stageDesc.pick: Finalize species and location in onboarding

dashboard.title: {{name}}'s portal
dashboard.subtitle: Curated around the species you picked.
dashboard.emptyHospitals: No vets matched your category yet.
dashboard.emptyShops: No shops matched your category yet.
dashboard.diaryEmpty: No diary entries yet. Open /diary to add your first.

hospitals.title: Specialist vets
hospitals.subtitle: Sorted by distance from your location
hospitals.noResult: No vets match the current filter.
hospitals.mapPlaceholder: Map preview (real KakaoMap renders when API key is configured)

shops.title: Food & gear shops
shops.subtitle: Offline stores and online retailers in one place.
shops.noResult: No shops match the current filter.

care.title: Care guide
care.subtitle: Environment, diet and health checkpoints for your species
care.notFound: No care guide registered for this species yet.

communities.title: Community
communities.subtitle: External forums, cafes and channels for your category
communities.noResult: No community registered for this category yet.

adoption.title: Adoption & rescue
adoption.subtitle: Vetted rescue groups, breeders and adoption hubs
adoption.noResult: No adoption channel registered for this category yet.

resources.title: External resources
resources.subtitle: 32 vetted Korean links, government, market and community sources for rare pets
resources.noResult: No external resource matches the current filter.

funeral.title: Farewell & memorial
funeral.subtitle: Government-registered services and memorial options
funeral.noResult: No farewell service registered for this category yet.

sos.title: Emergency SOS
sos.subtitle: Triage in under a minute, then call the nearest 24h emergency vet with one tap.
sos.noCategoryTitle: Pick a species category in onboarding first
sos.noCategoryDesc: We need the category to show species-specific triage steps.
sos.noEmergency: No registered 24h emergency vets in your category. Showing general vets instead.
sos.disclaimer: First-pass triage only. If in doubt, go to the vet.

consult.title: Vet live consult
consult.subtitle: 1-on-1 chat with exotic vets. (Demo, replies are auto-generated.)
consult.pickVet: Pick a vet from the left to start chatting.
consult.firstMessageHint: Include symptoms, environment (temp/humidity), and a photo description for a faster reply.

forum.title: Species community forum
forum.subtitle: Share notes with people who keep the same animals. Everything stays in this browser.
forum.author: Author
forum.titlePlaceholder: What do you want to discuss?
forum.bodyPlaceholder: Environment, symptoms, photos, more detail attracts better answers.
forum.empty: No posts in this category yet. Be the first!

errors.titleMax: Title must be 120 characters or fewer.
errors.authorMax: Nickname must be 40 characters or fewer.
errors.bodyMax: Body must be 2000 characters or fewer.
errors.replyMax: Reply must be 800 characters or fewer.

partners.title: Become a Pettography partner
partners.subtitle: Running a shop, vet clinic, or treat shop? Submit an application and our admin will review it.
partners.descriptionPlaceholder: Specialties, hours, supported species categories. (min 10 chars)

errors.descriptionMin: Pitch must be at least 10 characters.
errors.urlInvalid: URL must start with http:// or https://

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.subtitle: Stats, partner reviews and forum moderation.
admin.gateDesc: Demo toggle. Switching on exposes stats, partner queue and moderation tools.

match.title: Find your match
match.subtitle: Answer 5 questions and we'll rank species by difficulty, space, handling and budget fit.

experience.title: Experience
experience.hint: How experienced are you with pets so far?

space.title: Space
space.hint: How much space can the enclosure take?

handling.title: Handling
handling.hint: How much hands-on time do you want?

activity.title: Activity
activity.hint: Which activity pattern fits your lifestyle?

budget.title: Monthly budget
budget.hint: Monthly spend for food, gear and check-ups?

diary.title: Husbandry diary
diary.subtitle: Log feeding, weight, shedding and vet visits. Everything stays in this browser.
diary.weightOptional: Weight is collected on the 'weight' category only.
diary.emptyDesc: Your first entry powers senior-stage care later.

species.catalogSubtitle: Browse every species Pettography curates, narrow by category, difficulty or keyword.
species.searchPlaceholder: Search name, scientific name or tag
species.noResult: No species matched the current filter.
species.relatedHospitalsTitle: Nearby vets that treat this species
species.noRelatedHospitals: No vets registered for this category yet.
species.noRelatedShops: No shops registered for this category yet.

landing.title: From the first pick to the last farewell.
landing.description: Seven stages with your rare pet, one choice that sets up vets, food, care, community and farewell.
landing.featureSpeciesDesc: Reptiles, arthropods, rare birds and more, at species granularity
landing.featureLocationDesc: Vets and shops near Songpa-gu coordinates by default
landing.featureCareDesc: Environment, diet and health checkpoints on a single screen
landing.featureLifecycleDesc: Adoption to farewell, every stage links to vetted external resources

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist or has been moved.

footer.copyright: © {{year}} Pettography. Location data is mock around Songpa-gu.
